title: Ubiquiti UACC-Cable-C5e-Outdoor-Pro-305M-W, UniFi outdoor cable, Cat5e, 305m
description: The UniFi Outdoor Cable is an all-weather Category 5e cable designed to protect Gigabit Ethernet links from harsh weather damage and electromagnetic interference with its highly insulating, white, weatherproof jacket and built-in ESD drain wire. This 305m cable also features 24 AWG solid copper conductor pairings and internal foil shielding to optimize connection stability and performance
specsSearch: Physical characteristics Shielding type STP (U/FTP) Installation temperature [°C] 20 up to 60 Storage temperature [°C] 30 up to 75 Weight [kg/km] 41 Conductor wire gauge AWG24 Cable type Solid Purpose Outdoor Conductor material Copper Sheath material Thermoplastic Elastomer Length [m] 305 Outer diameter [mm) 6 Color White
